name: Phaser POP
description: The Phaser POP works like the [[Phaser CHOP]]. It does staggered (time-offset) animation interpolation on a POP attribute. Phaser outputs one new attribute Phaser. Each point animates Phaser from 0 to 1 over a cycle, but each point's value rises from 0 and arrives at 1 at different times. The Output Attribute Scope Phase can be used to blend or animate other attributes downstream. Phase is multi-component if the Phase Attribute Scope is multi-component. The Fraction parameter is by default clamped between 0 and 1. The Extend Input menu lets you control Fraction with numbers below 0 and above 1 with different effect. When Fraction goes above 1: * Clamp - default and current behavior - the values hold. * Cycle - the Phaser goes back to its 0 state and cycles the input time 0-1 * Mirror - the Phaser fully reverses and zig-zags the input time between 0-1 * Mirror Slope - the first sample starts decreasing first after the input time goes above 1 * Add - the Phaser outputs values that keep increasing when the input time goes beyond 1 See also [[Phaser CHOP]]

parameters.name: Parameter Size
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: Edge
parameters.label: Edge
parameters.description: Set the separation edge of the phasing between two states

parameters.name: Smooth Step
parameters.label: Smooth Step
parameters.description: Enable value remapping with a smoothstep function.

parameters.name: Cast to
parameters.label: Cast to
parameters.description: Allows to cast the output attribute to a different type if wanted.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the POP input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: Components
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: Default Value
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: Default values of the output attribute components if they cannot be computed.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: To Low
parameters.label: To Low
parameters.description: Sets low value on the output range.

parameters.name: To High
parameters.label: To High
parameters.description: Sets high value on the output range.
